name: Satellite Imagery Basemap
description: NASA GIBS true-color satellite basemap for visual earth-surface context.

metadata.label: Satellite Imagery
metadata.attribution: Tiles © Esri, Maxar, Earthstar Geographics, and the GIS User Community
metadata.constraints: imagery tile availability and attribution are governed by the upstream basemap provider
metadata.human_summary: Satellite imagery basemap for natural-color visual inspection of land, coasts, and clouds.
disambiguation_notes: Prefer this over street basemaps when the user asks for imagery, land cover context, or large-area visual inspection.
metadata.location_dependency: Location-specific; supports local and regional map extents.
